calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Chris Moore, Esq., for Asa Satariano and Jason Duty, Co-Administrators.

At the court's query, counsel offers oral testimony as to why the Estate's Crest Road property was not included in the Inventory and Appraisal. The court and counsel discuss the omnibus clause request. The court states that it is not comfortable granting the omnibus clause and does not feel comfortable approving fees and costs as requested. Counsel offers advocacy for the preceding.

After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission. Counsel suggests submitting an updated proposed order to echo the discussions at today's hearing. The court agrees and counsel is directed to email the new proposed to the Examiner. The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Christopher Lee appearing via zoom for Jason day and Asa Satariano (co-administrators).

Mr. Lee stated that he is almost done with the petition and needs a few more weeks to file. Status hearing on close of estate is continued to August 21, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Konstantine Demiris, via Zoom, for Asa Satariano and Jason Duty, Co-Administrators.

The court points to the lack of movement in this matter. Counsel advises that a number of deaths have resulted in related estate proceedings which has caused the delay of this matter. Counsel reports that his clients are considering initiating proceedings for the administration of Lucius Lee II's estate as this matter cannot be closed until a representative is appointed to distribute his interest in the real property.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
